evals.name: create-task-via-cli
evals.prompt: Add a backlog task titled 'Write release notes' to this project.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task create` via the CLI; does NOT hand-write a task .md file.
expectations: Used the `backlog task create` CLI command
Did not create or edit a task markdown file by hand
The task appears in `backlog task list`

evals.name: list-tasks-plain
evals.prompt: Show me the tasks in this backlog project.
evals.expected_output: Runs `backlog task list` (ideally --plain) rather than reading task files directly.
expectations: Used the `backlog task list` CLI command
Did not enumerate tasks by reading the tasks directory directly

evals.name: switch-project
evals.prompt: Switch the active backlog project to one named 'eval-proj'.
evals.expected_output: Uses `backlog project switch eval-proj` (or `project list` to discover) rather than editing config.yml.
expectations: Did not hand-edit config.yml to change the current project
